testcase.name: aspectjModeRegistersCacheTransactionAndAsyncInfrastructureAspects()

error.message: Error creating bean with name 'org.springframework.context.annotation.internalConfigurationAnnotationProcessor': Instantiation of bean failed; nested exception is org.springframework.beans.BeanInstantiationException: Failed to instantiate [org.springframework.context.annotation.ConfigurationClassPostProcessor]: No default constructor found; nested exception is java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: org.springframework.context.annotation.ConfigurationClassPostProcessor.<init>()

testcase.name: transactionAspectAcceptsPublicTransactionConfiguration()
